name: agentic-builder
description: Autonomous in-session SDLC orchestrator: a prompt becomes tested, working software via a parallel agent swarm on a global dependency-graph scheduler — with design-system routing, TDD, two-stage code review, runtime file-ownership locking, per-role model tiering + token/USD budget caps, cross-session memory, session replay, an unattended/CI mode, and a live dark/light dashboard (locked plan flowchart, interactive approvals, per-gate test progress, milestone undo/redo). Runs under Claude Code with no API key.
